This Week's Task

Join the #ai-unlock10x channel, post a photo of your favorite robot, and throw up a 🤙. That's it — introduce yourself to AI enablement.

Deadline: Wednesday EOD. Late submissions are welcome and earn 50% of the base score (no speed bonus or BIC eligible).

Scoring Breakdown

Base Project
Full (photo + 🤙)40 pts
Partial (missing item)25 pts
Joined only10 pts
Has not started0 pts
Late (after deadline)50% base
Speed
Within 4 hours+10 pts
Within 12 hours+5 pts
Within 24 hours+2 pts
Best in Class
Top 5 by reactions+10 pts
